modules.purpose: BLADE Workflow Builder — Visual n8n-style automation engine
Data structures
Shared Phase 11 paste parser — detects cURL / JSON-config / Python-SDK snippets and returns a unified ParsedProviderConfig (provider + model + base_url + api_key + headers)

Phase 11 capability probe — wraps providers::test_connection with a static capability-matrix lookup to populate ProviderCapabilityRecord (vision / audio / tool_calling / long_context) on key save. Idempotent, single-shot per key save (4ab464c posture).
Phase 12 deep_scan enrichment — enriches scan profile with additional metadata.
Phase 12 deep_scan leads — generates actionable leads from scan results.
Phase 12 deep_scan profile — ScanProfile struct + persistence.
Phase 12 deep_scan queue — scan job queue and prioritization.
Phase 12 deep_scan rhythm — scheduling and cadence control for scan loops.
Phase 12 deep_scan scanners module root — exports all scanner implementations.
Phase 12 scanner — discovers active AI session directories and config files.
Phase 12 scanner — reads browser bookmarks to build context about user interests.
Phase 12 scanner — walks filesystem for local code repositories.
Phase 12 scanner — extracts git remote URLs from discovered repositories.
Phase 12 scanner — discovers IDE workspace configs (VS Code, JetBrains, etc.).
Phase 12 scanner — reads Most Recently Used file lists from OS shell.
Phase 12 scanner — parses shell history (.zsh_history, .bash_history) for tech stack signals.
Phase 12 scanner — runs `which` sweep for CLI tools to detect installed stack.
Phase 13 ecosystem — tentacle orchestration, emit_activity logging, observer loop management.

routes.data_shape: Agent[] grouped by role into a 3x3 emoji grid
Agent[] { id, role, status, progress } + active count
BackgroundAgent[] { cli, pid, status, log lines }
EvolutionLevel + Suggestion[] + Forge tools + self-critique history
ChatStateValue { messages[], status, error } via ChatProvider context
reachable_paths: route:chat -> ChatPanel -> useChatCtx -> chat.ts wrappers -> src-tauri/src/commands.rs

routes.data_shape: PerceptionState + HormoneState (split across RightNowHero + AmbientStrip children)
Meeting[] + search hits; detail pane on selection
tabbed shell; landing pane defaults to Providers
Thin entry pane delegating to admin/Diagnostics route
IoT integration state (Home Assistant + Spotify tokens/endpoints)
Persona traits + chat style + external style import
WorldState + summary; refreshes on WORLD_STATE_UPDATED event
main-window QuickAsk route gated on vision capability (PROV-07)
main-window VoiceOrb route gated on audio capability (PROV-08)
main-window MeetingGhost route gated on audio capability (PROV-08)
Alias for SwarmView gated on tool-calling capability (PROV-08)
Full-repo indexing view gated on long-context capability (PROV-08)
EcosystemPane — tentacle enable/disable toggles, Phase 13 self-configuring ecosystem
palette-only LockScreenAction — calls lockScreen() on mount then navigates to settings
ProfileView — user profile from Phase 12 scan identity context

dead_deletion_plan.deletion_note: Legacy field with #[serde(default, skip_serializing)] — only read during load_config() to migrate plaintext keys into the keyring, then cleared. Never written. Kept for backwards compatibility; once telemetry confirms no users still have plaintext config.json, this field can be removed in Phase 14.
